pattern_cost: The cost appears when progress and control become the clearest test of leadership. Plans tighten, standards sharpen, and movement becomes easier to inspect than the quality of commitment behind it.
range_narrowing: In that pattern, resistance can be read too late because the work still looks organised from the outside. You may get movement, but not always the confidence, trust, or honest challenge that keeps movement durable.
weaker_signal_link: People is the missing range when the work needs more than compliance. A stronger reading would ask who is carrying doubt quietly, who has agreed without owning the route, and what would make the plan feel workable as well as correct.
notes: Editorial rewrite applied for all Limitation rows

pattern_cost: The cost appears when a compelling destination and the push for visible progress combine before the route is strong enough to carry them. The work can feel urgent and meaningful, yet still rely too heavily on improvisation.
range_narrowing: In that pattern, execution risk is often discovered mid-flight rather than designed out early. Priorities may stay clear while sequencing, ownership, or decision discipline remain looser than the stakes require.
weaker_signal_link: Process is the missing range when momentum needs a more dependable operating shape. A stronger reading would slow just enough to define the sequence, the decision points, the owners, and the standards that will keep pace from turning into avoidable rework.
notes: Editorial rewrite applied for all Limitation rows

pattern_cost: The cost appears when urgency and relational awareness keep the work moving, but the route stays more adaptive than dependable. You may respond well in the room while still leaving the operating shape under-specified.
range_narrowing: In that pattern, people can feel included and the pace can stay high, yet expectations may shift too easily between conversations, owners, or contexts. What feels responsive in the moment can become harder to repeat under pressure.
weaker_signal_link: Process is the missing range when the work needs clearer discipline around how decisions are carried, checked, and followed through. A stronger reading would make the route more explicit so responsiveness does not come at the cost of consistency.
notes: Editorial rewrite applied for all Limitation rows

limitation_label: When the plan is clearer than the buy-in
pattern_cost: The cost appears when structure and direction align so well that the work looks settled before the human reality is. The route can feel coherent, purposeful, and defensible, while commitment remains thinner than the plan suggests.
range_narrowing: In that pattern, disagreement may surface late because the operating logic is already well formed. The system can keep moving even while confidence, energy, or trust are falling out of view.
weaker_signal_link: People is the missing range when a strong route still needs fuller commitment behind it. A stronger reading would ask who is not yet with the direction, what resistance is staying informal, and what conversation would turn agreement into genuine ownership.
notes: Editorial rewrite applied for all Limitation rows

pattern_cost: The cost appears when care and coordination keep the environment workable, but not demanding enough. The team can feel held and organised while the work itself receives less sharp pressure around pace, consequence, or measurable progress.
range_narrowing: In that pattern, underperformance can hide inside good intentions because the system is more focused on continuity than escalation. The room may stay functional without fully confronting what the work now needs to prove.
weaker_signal_link: Results is the missing range when clarity and care still need a firmer performance edge. A stronger reading would ask what progress must now be visible, where the standard needs tightening, and what decision has been deferred for too long.
notes: Editorial rewrite applied for all Limitation rows

pattern_cost: The cost appears when meaning and connection create strong alignment, but the work stays looser than the ambition behind it. People may believe in the direction while still lacking enough structure to carry it reliably.
range_narrowing: In that pattern, goodwill can mask operational vagueness. The room may feel committed, yet ownership, sequence, or decision hygiene can stay less explicit than the work requires once pressure rises.
weaker_signal_link: Process is the missing range when commitment now needs a firmer route. A stronger reading would translate the shared direction into clearer owners, stages, standards, and review points so belief can survive contact with complexity.
notes: Editorial rewrite applied for all Limitation rows
